title: Litematica Companion
description: Companion mod for Litematica to show a scrollable blocklist and other things in the inventory screen about the loaded schematic.
body:
# Litematica Companion
Simple companion mod for Litematica to show a scrollable blocklist and other things in the inventory screen about the loaded schematic.

**Note:** Ill fix this but you have to, for now at least, first open the material list, by default the keybind is M+L, to load the blocks. After that theyll show up on the inventory list. **I fixed this**

For any issues or suggestions you can add them here: [Issues](https://github.com/qinx0/litematica-companion/issues) or you can [dm me on discord](https://discord.com/channels/@me/835834540508446760)/qinx___

Versions:
 - [ ] 26.1+
 - [x] 1.21.11
 - [x] 1.21.10
 - [x] 1.21.9
 - [x] 1.21.8
 - [x] 1.21.7
 - [X] 1.21.6
 - [X] 1.21.5
 - [X] 1.21.4
 - [X] 1.21.3
 - [X] 1.21.2
 - [X] 1.21
